RESOURCE.INFO: A bibliographic source citable for (parts of) this data
Data centre that has delivered the data

INFO.name: rights
INFO.value: H.E.S.S. collaboration, 2018. The data and documentation is publicly released by the H.E.S.S. collaboration as a contribution to the ongoing efforts to define a common open format for data level 3 of imaging atmospheric Cherenkov telescopes (IACTs) and IACT open-source science tool development, to enlarge the community involved in IACT data analysis. No scientific publications may be derived from the data. Using the data for new claims about the astrophysical sources is not permitted. When using this data, please include the following attribution: "This work made use of data from the H.E.S.S. DL3 public test data release 1 (HESS DL3 DR1, H.E.S.S. collaboration, 2018)". Alternatively, use the following shorter version, e.g. for presentations: "HESS DL3 DR1, H.E.S.S. collaboration". These terms of use must be included in all copies in full or part of the data. https://www.mpi-hd.mpg.de/hfm/HESS/pages/dl3-dr1/

RESOURCE.INFO: Legal conditions applicable to (parts of) the data contained
More information on the data Source
Name of a person or entity that produced a contributing resource
Request string that produced this VOTable

FIELD.name: ID
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Publisher data set id; this is an identifier for the dataset in question and can be used to retrieve the data.

FIELD.name: access_url
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: URL to retrieve the data or access the service.

FIELD.name: service_def
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifier for the type of service if accessURL refers to a service.

FIELD.name: error_message
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: If accessURL is empty, this column gives the reason why.

FIELD.name: semantics
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: What kind of data is linked here? Standard identifiers here include science, calibration, preview, info, auxiliary

FIELD.name: content_type
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Media type for the data returned.

FIELD.name: content_length
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Size of the resource at access_url.

FIELD.name: local_semantics
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An identifier that allows clients to associate rows from different datalink documents on the same service with each other.

FIELD.name: content_qualifier
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An identifier for the sort of content obtained by dereferencing the link (e.g., spectrum, image, or cube). Terms here are relative to http://www.ivoa.net/rdf/product-type

TR.TD: Preview significance distribution of the observation
